source_name: CDC Open Data: RESP-NET hospitalization rates (RSV/Flu/COVID)
notes: Older-adult outcomes: FluSurv-NET + RSV-NET; mainline uses age_group=65+ yr and site=Overall; include per-site series for external validity; rate_type=Observed

source_name: CDC Open Data: NREVSS RSV laboratory data
notes: Signals (sensitivity only): compute national positivity as sum(pos)/sum(test) across HHS regions; normalize repweekcode YYWW→YYYYWW for joins; current public export appears to end at 2020W26 so not used as the primary RSV signal for 2022+ evaluation

source_name: CDC Open Data: Percent of tests positive for viral respiratory pathogens
notes: Signal: influenza percent positivity (more specific than syndromic wILI); short historical window (2022+)

source_name: CDC Open Data: NSSP ED visits percent (COVID/Flu/RSV/Combined) by demographic category
notes: Signal layer: ED care-seeking proxy; use geography=United States, demographics_type=Age Group, pathogen in (Influenza, RSV); available from ~2022-10 onward
Optional influenza syndromic signal; retain raw JSON response as snapshot
